Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Wanna walk home together?[n]{f 1 5 0}Hit me up if you do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Just kidding! {f 1 3 158}[n]Sorry! Did you get mad? {f 1 3 143}[n]Let's go home together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Wanna drop by the {f 1 3 150} together on the way back?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Are you free today?[n]{f 1 5 0}Let's hang out somewhere before heading back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sorry to dump this on you so suddenly, but there's something I want to talk about.[n]{f 1 5 0}Can we meet after school?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I didn't have lunch today {f 1 3 138}[n]I wanna eat a proper meal.[n]{f 1 5 0}Do you wanna come with?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Wanna go home together? {f 1 3 156}[n]Lemme know if you do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 1}-kun, there's something I have to ask you. If you have the time, could we meet after school?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Did you fall asleep in class? I'm keeping an eye on you, mister! {f 1 3 136}[n]Anyway, let's head home together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have you been eating properly?[n]{f 1 5 0}Sorry, was that a weird question? {f 1 3 138}[n]Anyway, are you free after school?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You are, right? {f 1 3 137}[n]Wanna head back to the dorm together? I'll be waiting in the classroom after school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Do you have some time to spare today? Wanna walk back together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Are you doing anything today? Wanna walk home together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since we have the day off, I was thinking of going somewhere {f 1 3 140}[n]Do you wanna join me? Just lemme know![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was supposed to go with a friend, but she couldn't make it today. {f 1 3 138}[n]I'd rather not go alone, so I figured we could go together.[n]{f 1 5 0}I hear the plot really makes you think! {f 1 3 139}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's going to be a festival at Naganaki Shrine! {f 1 3 140}[n]They don't hold festivals there very often, so I'm thinking about dressing up for it...[n]{f 1 5 0}Do you wanna go together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hehe, I just wanted to say that for fun. {f 1 3 140}[n]I know I don't usually say these kinda things, but since it's a pretty special day, I thought maybe we could spend it together like how other people do. {f 1 3 154}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}He really likes to lie down out at the dorm's front entrance, huh? {f 1 3 137} But it doesn't seem like he's just lazing around...[n]{f 4 1}-kun, if you see him out there, could you check in on him? {f 1 3 157}[n]{f 1 1}
